organization.name: Edmunds GovTech
keywords: financial erp solutions for local government
organization.short_description:
Edmunds GovTech is a software company based in Northfield, New Jersey, that specializes in Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) solutions for local government agencies across the United States. Founded in 1972, the company has focused exclusively on this sector since 1992, evolving from programming services for the Department of Defense to a leading provider of integrated software solutions. With over 141 employees and approximately $29.6 million in revenue, Edmunds GovTech serves more than 2,150 municipalities and authorities nationwide.

The company offers a comprehensive ERP platform that includes 28 modules covering various government functions such as finance, tax collection, utility billing, personnel management, permitting, and citizen engagement. Their solutions are designed to improve municipal management and enhance operational efficiency. Edmunds GovTech is recognized for its commitment to usability and innovation, providing tools that empower citizens and promote government transparency. The company values collaboration and has built strong partnerships to expand its offerings and support local government needs effectively.

organization.name: HemaSource, Inc
organization.raw_address: 485 S 5700 W, Salt Lake City, Utah 84104, US
organization.short_description:
HemaSource, Inc. is a technology-enabled specialty logistics solution provider and medical supply distributor based in Salt Lake City, Utah. The company focuses on serving ambulatory clinics, particularly in the plasma collection and dialysis sectors. HemaSource combines advanced data analytics software with a wide range of high-quality medical disposables and related equipment to help healthcare providers optimize their operations and achieve cost savings.

A key offering is HemaSource's patented web-based ordering and analytics software, ACE™, which automates inventory calculations and provides detailed usage analytics. This software enhances operational efficiency by optimizing inventory levels and reducing waste. HemaSource distributes over 1,300 SKUs from strategically located distribution centers, primarily targeting plasma collection centers, dialysis clinics, and other post-acute care settings. The company is recognized as a leading distributor in the plasma collection industry, leveraging over 100 years of combined industry experience to simplify supply chain complexities for its partners.
